name: Mokoan Solar Farm
notable: 46 MW solar farm near Benalla, VIC. Developed by Elecnor.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2025-05 to 2025-05-22 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Commercial ops June 2025 — first CIS T1 non-NSW project to reach operations. Financial close Mar 2024 predates CIS T1 award (Dec 2024) — European Energy proceeded to construction on pre-award financing; CIS T1 award became a revenue-floor overlay on an already-financed project. Installed 58 MW AC vs 46 MW CIS award — CIS floor calibrated to 46 MW award figure.

operational_notes: Commercial ops June 2025. FIRST CIS T1 non-NSW project to reach operations. Financial close Mar 2024 (pre-CIS T1 award — CIS T1 was Dec 2024). Installed 58 MW AC (vs 46 MW award). Battery add-on (80 MWh BESS) in separate development. SPV 'EE Solar 6 Pty Ltd' held by European Energy Australia (Danish parent).
